section_name: Director to Adopt Rules and Develop Forms

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 680. Misc. Provisions
##### § 680.005 — Director to Adopt Rules and Develop Forms

The director of the department shall adopt rules and develop forms to administer this subchapter.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The director of the department shall adopt rules and develop forms to administer this subchapter.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
